title: ophrys oxyrrhynchos subsp. lacaitae
intro: Ophrys oxyrrhynchos subsp. lacaitae, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of the Bee Orchid have been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, for topical application.
